Security & Patient Privacy

Call Recording Retention Policy

Configure how long audio recordings are retained to comply with HIPAA/local medical privacy laws. AI transcripts are kept permanently.

Time after call ends before audio is auto-deleted from the counselor's view.
Time before audio is permanently hard-deleted from server storage.

Upload OPD Dispensation Sheet

Drag and drop your .xlsx or .csv file here, or click to browse

Required Columns:

  • Patient ID (e.g. PAT-001)
  • Date of Visit (e.g. 2026-05-23)
  • Medicine Given (e.g. Buprenorphine)
  • Quantity (e.g. 5)
  • Next Scheduled Visit (e.g. 2026-05-30)

COWS Scale: 0–4 = No withdrawal · 5–12 = Mild · 13–24 = Moderate · 25–36 = Moderately Severe · 37+ = Severe
